Class WindowAndTabSteps

java.lang.Object
io.github.sentinel.steps.WindowAndTabSteps
public class WindowAndTabSteps extends Object

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    closeCurrentWindow()
    Closes the currently active window or browser tab.
    static void

    Opens the given pageName in a new window
    static void
    switchTo(String pageName)
    Redirects to the given pageName
    static void
    switchTo(String pageName, String title, String direction)
    Opens the given pageName in an existing window
    static void
    switchToContains(String pageName, String key)
    Opens the given pageName in an existing window that has a title containing the previously-used text.

  • Constructor Details

    • WindowAndTabSteps

      public WindowAndTabSteps()

  • Method Details

    • closeCurrentWindow

      @When("^I close the (?:browser|current) (?:tab|window)$") public static void closeCurrentWindow()
      Closes the currently active window or browser tab.

      Gherkin Examples:

      • I close the current window"
      • I close the current tab"
      • I close the browser window
      • I close the browser tab

    • openNewWindow

      @Then("^I verify a new (?:tab|window) opens(?: to)? the (.*?)$") public static void openNewWindow(String pageName) throws InterruptedException
      Opens the given pageName in a new window

      Gherkin Examples:

      • I verify a new tab opens the Home page
      • I verify a new window opens to the Login page
      • I verify a new tab opens to the Google Maps page
      Parameters:
      pageName - String the page to open
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the thread gets interrupted

    • switchTo

      public static void switchTo(String pageName) throws InterruptedException
      Redirects to the given pageName

      Gherkin Examples:

      • I am redirected to the home page
      • I remain on the login page
      • I switch to the results window
      Parameters:
      pageName - String the page to open
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the thread gets interrupted

    • switchTo

      @Then("^I (?:am redirected to|remain on|switch to) the (.*?)(?:with the title \"([^\"]*)\")?(?: o?i?n the (previous|next) (?:window|tab))?$") public static void switchTo(String pageName, String title, String direction) throws InterruptedException
      Opens the given pageName in an existing window

      Gherkin Examples:

      • I verify a new tab opens the Home page
      • I verify a new window opens to the Login page
      • I verify a new tab opens to the Google Maps page
      Parameters:
      pageName - String the page to open
      title - String title of the page to go to
      direction - String (next|previous) window to open
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the thread gets interrupted

    • switchToContains

      @Then("^I look for and switch to a window on the (.*) with a title that contains the same text (?:entered|used) (?:for|in) the (.*?)$") public static void switchToContains(String pageName, String key) throws InterruptedException
      Opens the given pageName in an existing window that has a title containing the previously-used text.

      Gherkin Examples:
      • I look for and switch to a window on the Presidents Page with a title that contains the same text used for the preferences input
      • I look for and switch to a window on the Presidents Page with a title that contains the same text entered in the preferences input
      Parameters:
      pageName - String name of the page to switch to.
      key - String the name of the element where the text was previously used, or the configuration variable used to lookup the stored value.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the thread gets interrupted.
